description: OpenALPR, part of Rekor, provides vehicle and license-plate recognition products. Its CarCheck offering analyzes still vehicle images and returns plate and vehicle metadata such as make, model, color, and direction of travel.
summary: openalpr.com exposes one documented developer integration surface: the OpenALPR/Rekor CarCheck REST API at https://api.openalpr.com/v3, authenticated with a CarCheck secret key passed as the `secret_key` query parameter.
